caption: A man with glasses and long hair tied back stands behind a podium, speaking into a microphone. He wears a white long-sleeved shirt paired with a dark, embroidered vest and a red and white beaded necklace. A yellow guitar is partially visible in front of him. The setting is indoors with beige horizontal blinds in the background. Several people, seen from the back, are in the foreground, listening to him. A black podium displays the white text "ORCA". Across the sequence, the man remains in place, speaking into the microphone with slight changes in his facial expression and head position. In the final frame, he turns his head slightly to his left, shifting his gaze away from the center. The lighting and background remain consistent throughout the scene.
